mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.organisation_flat WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, company_name AS "companyName", legal_name AS "legalName", registration_number AS "registrationNumber", gst_number AS "gstNumber", pan_number AS "panNumber", domain, active, logo_url AS "logoUrl", favicon_url AS "faviconUrl", primary_color AS "primaryColor", copyright_text AS "copyrightText", founded_year AS "foundedYear", primary_email AS "primaryEmail", support_email AS "supportEmail", primary_phone AS "primaryPhone", support_phone AS "supportPhone", website_url AS "websiteUrl", address_line1 AS "addressLine1", address_line2 AS "addressLine2", city, state, pincode, country, currency, timezone, locale, date_format AS "dateFormat", country_code AS "countryCode", facebook_url AS "facebookUrl", twitter_url AS "twitterUrl", instagram_url AS "instagramUrl", linkedin_url AS "linkedinUrl", youtube_url AS "youtubeUrl" FROM hm_query.organisation_flat WHERE id = #{id}
